title: Rapid COVID-19 tests: Handout for pharmacies - Canada.ca
content:
## Rapid COVID-19 tests: Handout for pharmacies
Download in PDF format (953 KB, 1 pages)
Organization: Public Health Agency of Canada
Published: 2021-08-14
COVID-19 rapid tests are now available at [insert pharmacy name]

## Test your employees, help protect your business.
As businesses safely reopen and vaccination rates increase, continuing to test and screen for COVID-19 can help prevent outbreaks, maintain safe workplaces and keep the economy running.
[insert pharmacy name and address] is distributing rapid tests to small and medium-sized businesses and non-profit organizations like yours to help you implement workplace screening for your employees.
Workplace screening is easy to set up and requires minimal resources.
- are safe and easy to use
- produce results within 15 minutes
- should be administered at least twice a week
Combined with existing public health measures, rapid tests can help:
- identify employees who may be infected with COVID-19 but have no symptoms
- protect your workers, customers and community
- limit the spread of COVID-19
- keep businesses open

## Help protect your business by ordering rapid tests today
Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) can  access rapid tests by contacting participating  pharmacies directly.
Canada.ca/covid-workplace-testing
